hooks.command: [ ! -f "CLAUDE.md" ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"CLAUDE.md is missing. Run /init to create project documentation."}}' && exit 0; newer=$(find . -not -path './.git/*' -not -path './node_modules/*' \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.json' -o -name '*.css' \) -newer CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | head -3); [ -n "$newer" ] && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"Project files have changed since CLAUDE.md was last updated. Run /init now to refresh it before starting work.\"}}" || true
